sentence: ARTICLE 3: Terms of access to the Application
To use the Application in any illegal manner, for any illegal purpose or in any manner incompatible with the Terms ;

To sell, copy, reproduce, rent, lend, distribute, transfer or license all or part of the content appearing in the Application; or to decompile, disassemble, modify, analyze any source code or change the behavior via third party software of all or part of the Application ;

To attempt to gain unauthorized access to the Application's computer system or to engage in any activity that disrupts, decreases the quality, interferes with the performance, or degrades the functionality of the Application ;
To use the application for abusive purposes by deliberately introducing viruses or other malicious programs and attempt to gain unauthorized access to the Application;
To infringe the intellectual property rights of the Company and its Customers ;
To denigrate the Application and/or the Company and/or its Customers ;
And in general, to fail to comply with any legal or regulatory obligations that may be imposed by law and in fact on them.
ARTICLE 6: Guarantee relating to the availability of the Application
